calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-01-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Angie Diner.
Deborah B. Honig, Esq. for Plaintiff: City and County of San Francisco.
Plaintiff's Witness: Margarita Rodriguez, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: William Lee Taylor as follows:
Damages $19,385.72
Costs $303.50, for a total of $19,689.22
As to Co-Defendant: Robert J. Moskowitz, judgment for Defendant after demurrer sustained, on appeal.
Judgment signed in open court.
